news.title: SpaceX’s Starlink nabs American Airlines contract, another win for its IPO
news.summary: American Airlines said Tuesday it plans to install Starlink on more than 500 Airbus aircraft, the latest carrier win for IPO-bound SpaceX.

news.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
news.summary: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.

news.title: This startup is betting India’s gig economy can train the world’s robots
news.summary: Human Archive, a startup founded by UC Berkeley and Stanford researchers, is paying gig workers in India to wear camera-equipped caps and sensor devices to collect the real-world physical training data that AI and robotics labs are racing to acquire.

news.title: Dutch government blocks US company from acquisition, citing ‘risk to public interest’
